creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Eric F Crist <ecrist@secure-computing.net> -----

Cc: FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org
From: Eric F Crist <ecrist@secure-computing.net>
Subject: Re: ports/143750: new port net/rackmonkey
To: Mark Linimon <linimon@lonesome.com>

That would probably be a better category than net, to be honest.  Can we put it in net-mgmt and www, instead of net?

----- End forwarded message -----
